tier_rationale: Repository state finalization includes committing documentation/work-history changes, merging to main, and pushing origin/main.
request_summary: Check git status, commit current pending repository changes, merge to main if needed, and push to origin.
goal: Finalize the current worktree state without reverting user changes or committing ignored secret files.

positive: Inspect git status and changed files before staging.
Use a task branch for the finalization commit when possible.
negative: Do not commit .env, .dev.vars, API keys, passwords, or PII.
Do not revert unrelated user changes.

success_criteria: A task log records TASK_CREATED and completion status.
Pending tracked and intended untracked artifacts are committed.
main is updated and pushed to origin/main.
Final git status is reported to the user.

context.initial_status_summary: main matched origin/main with docs/agents/analyst.md modified and TASK-20260426-079 artifacts untracked.
